steps.t: Dol Amroth can be viewed to the west of Amon Lontir. Boradan has asked you to look from the beacon to Dol Amroth.
Boradan can be found on the beacon, Amon Lontir, just outside Ost Lontir. You have looked upon Dol Amroth and should now speak to Boradan.
Edhellond can be viewed to the north of Amon Lontir. Boradan has asked you to look from the beacon to Edhellond.
Boradan can be found on the beacon, Amon Lontir, just outside Ost Lontir. You have looked upon Edhellond and should now speak to Boradan.
